summary: Three fixes verified: (1) BUG FIX CRITICAL: Clicking 'Watch & Continue', 'Create New', or story cards NO LONGER auto-triggers story processing - shows INPUT FORM with Title/Story Text fields as expected. freshSession flag working correctly. (2) FEATURE: All 10 Creator Tools visible in grid (Story Series, Character Memory, Reel Generator, Photo to Comic, Comic Storybook, Bedtime Stories, Reaction GIF, Caption Rewriter, Brand Story, Daily Viral Ideas). (3) Dashboard UI: Admin bar visible for admin users only, FEATURED badge with shadow, 'See what happens' CTA on story cards, correct create bar placeholder.
critical_code_review_comments: StoryVideoPipeline.js correctly implements freshSession flag check in loadUserJobs() - prevents auto-reconnection to active jobs when navigating from Dashboard
Dashboard.js correctly passes { state: { freshSession: true } } in all navigation calls (Watch & Continue, Create New, story cards, feature cards)
All 10 Creator Tools have correct data-testid attributes and navigate to correct routes
Admin top bar correctly shows only for users with ADMIN/SUPERADMIN role in JWT
Create bar placeholder correctly shows 'What happens next? Continue any story or start fresh...'

success_rate.backend: 100% (1/1 API test passed - story-feed returns non-null thumbnails)

context_for_next_testing_agent: freshSession bug fix verified - navigating to /app/story-video-studio from Dashboard shows INPUT FORM, not auto-processing. All 10 Creator Tools visible and navigating correctly. Admin bar shows only for admin users.

critical_bug_fix_no_auto_processing.details: Navigating to /app/story-video-studio shows INPUT FORM (Title, Story Text, Generate Video button) - NO auto-processing

watch_continue_no_auto_processing.details: Clicking 'Watch & Continue' button navigates to studio with INPUT FORM visible

create_new_no_auto_processing.details: Clicking 'Create New' button navigates to studio with INPUT FORM visible

story_card_click_no_auto_processing.details: Clicking story cards navigates to studio with INPUT FORM visible

creator_tools_grid_visible.details: Creator Tools section with Zap icon heading visible

all_10_features_visible.details: Story Series, Character Memory, Reel Generator, Photo to Comic, Comic Storybook, Bedtime Stories, Reaction GIF, Caption Rewriter, Brand Story, Daily Viral Ideas - all 10 visible

feature_card_navigation.details: Reel Generator card navigates to /app/reels correctly

admin_bar_visible_for_admin.details: Admin user sees ADMIN PANEL top bar with Shield icon

admin_bar_hidden_for_regular_user.details: Regular user (test@visionary-suite.com) does NOT see admin top bar

story_cards_see_what_happens_cta.details: Story cards show 'See what happens' CTA text

create_bar_placeholder.details: Create bar shows 'What happens next? Continue any story or start fresh...' placeholder
